## Validation
- [ ] Ran the relevant tests/build for this change
- [ ] Ran `bash scripts/hygiene_check.sh`

## Hygiene Checklist
- [ ] Work was done from a dedicated linked worktree
- [ ] Changes were not made on `main` or `master`
- [ ] Reviewed the exact branch/PR head being changed
- [ ] Checked logic risks, not just green tests
- [ ] Added or updated tests when behavior changed
